zotero_searches.query: MST1R RON receptor tyrosine kinase inflammation lipid metabolism tissue repair ovarian function cardiometabolic traits PCOS sedentary behavior GWAS 3p21.31
zotero_searches.notes: Returned mainly PCOS genetics, PCOS cardiometabolic risk, and movement-behavior papers; MST1R-specific evidence was weak or absent in local Zotero.

zotero_searches.query: MST1R RON PCOS ovarian cardiometabolic inflammation lipid metabolism
zotero_searches.notes: Original exact search returned no results; fallback to MST1R found mostly unrelated notes and one MASLD pleiotropy paper.

pubmed_searches.query: (MST1R OR RON receptor tyrosine kinase OR macrophage-stimulating protein receptor) AND (inflammation OR lipid metabolism OR tissue repair OR ovary OR polycystic ovary syndrome OR cardiometabolic)

inclusion_criteria: PCOS genetic, cardiometabolic, or movement-behavior context
exclusion_criteria: Optional background records not needed in final RIS
Records that do not support MST1R/RON or PCOS context claims
unresolved_gaps: No direct MST1R-PCOS or MST1R-ovarian-function evidence found
rs7615206 and MAGMA/TWAS-JTI/SMR prioritization must be cited as current-study findings
